scripts.go_mod: rimraf src/server/go.mod && rimraf src/server/go.sum && cd src/server && go mod init github.com/mt3hr/gkill/src/server && cd gkill/main/gkill_server && go mod tidy
scripts.clean_app_embed: rimraf src/server/gkill/api/embed/html && rimraf src/server/gkill/api/embed/i18n && rimraf src/server/gkill/api/embed/manual && rimraf src/server/gkill/api/embed/version.json
scripts.put_version_info_embed: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process');const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const pkg=require(path.resolve('package.json'));const ver=pkg&&pkg.version?String(pkg.version):'unknown';let hash='unknown';try{hash=execSync('git show --format=%H --no-patch',{encoding:'utf8'}).trim()}catch(e){hash=process.env.GITHUB_SHA||process.env.COMMIT_SHA||'unknown'};const d=new Date();const pad=n=>String(n).padStart(2,'0');const tzMin=-d.getTimezoneOffset();const sign=tzMin>=0?'+':'-';const oh=pad(Math.floor(Math.abs(tzMin)/60));const om=pad(Math.abs(tzMin)%60);const bt=d.getFullYear()+'-'+pad(d.getMonth()+1)+'-'+pad(d.getDate())+'T'+pad(d.getHours())+':'+pad(d.getMinutes())+':'+pad(d.getSeconds())+sign+oh+':'+om;const out=path.join('src/server/gkill/api/embed','version.json');fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(out),{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync(out,JSON.stringify({commit_hash:hash,build_time:bt,version:ver},null,2)+'\n');"
scripts.prepare_install: npm run clean_app_embed && npm run put_version_info_embed && npm run build && npm run copy_dist_to_app_embed && npm run copy_i18n_to_app_embed && npm run copy_manual_to_app_embed
scripts.build_x_compile: npm run build_windows_amd64_app && npm run build_windows_amd64 && npm run build_linux_amd64 && npm run build_linux_arm64 && npm run build_linux_arm && npm run build_android_arm && npm run build_android_arm64 && npm run build_android_apk && npm run build_wear_os
scripts.build_windows_amd64: rsrc -ico public/favicon.ico -o src/server/gkill/main/gkill_server/resource_windows_amd64.syso -arch amd64 && mkdirp release/windows_amd64 && cd src/server/gkill/main/gkill_server && cross-env CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=windows GOARCH=amd64 go build -ldflags "-s -w" -o ../../../../../release/windows_amd64/gkill_server.exe && node -e "try{require('child_process').execSync('strip ../../../../../release/windows_amd64/gkill_server.exe')}catch(e){}" && rimraf resource_windows_amd64.syso
scripts.build_windows_amd64_app: rsrc -ico public/favicon.ico -o src/server/gkill/main/gkill/resource_windows_amd64.syso -arch amd64 && mkdirp release/windows_amd64 && cd src/server/gkill/main/gkill && cross-env CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=windows GOARCH=amd64 go build -ldflags "-s -w -H windowsgui" -o ../../../../../release/windows_amd64/gkill.exe && node -e "try{require('child_process').execSync('strip ../../../../../release/windows_amd64/gkill.exe')}catch(e){}" && rimraf resource_windows_amd64.syso
scripts.build_linux_amd64: mkdirp release/linux_amd64 && cd src/server/gkill/main/gkill_server && cross-env CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -o ../../../../../release/linux_amd64/gkill_server
scripts.build_linux_arm64: mkdirp release/linux_arm64 && cd src/server/gkill/main/gkill_server && cross-env CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=arm64 go build -o ../../../../../release/linux_arm64/gkill_server
scripts.build_linux_arm: mkdirp release/linux_arm && cd src/server/gkill/main/gkill_server && cross-env CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=arm go build -o ../../../../../release/linux_arm/gkill_server
scripts.setup_wear_os_gradle: shx cp src/android/gradlew src/wear_os/gradlew && shx cp src/android/gradlew.bat src/wear_os/gradlew.bat && mkdirp src/wear_os/gradle/wrapper && shx cp src/android/gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar src/wear_os/gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar
scripts.build_wear_os: npm run build_wear_os_companion && npm run build_wear_os_watch
scripts.release: cross-env MINIFY=true npm run prepare_install && npm run build_x_compile && node -e "var x=require('child_process').execSync,v=require('./package.json').version,fs=require('fs');x('7za a -tzip -mx9 ../windows_amd64_gkill_'+v+'.zip gkill.exe',{cwd:'release/windows_amd64',stdio:'inherit'});x('7za a -tzip -mx9 ../windows_amd64_gkill_server_'+v+'.zip gkill_server.exe',{cwd:'release/windows_amd64',stdio:'inherit'});x('7za a -tzip -mx9 ../linux_amd64_gkill_server_'+v+'.zip gkill_server',{cwd:'release/linux_amd64',stdio:'inherit'});x('7za a -tzip -mx9 ../linux_arm64_gkill_server_'+v+'.zip gkill_server',{cwd:'release/linux_arm64',stdio:'inherit'});x('7za a -tzip -mx9 ../linux_arm_gkill_server_'+v+'.zip gkill_server',{cwd:'release/linux_arm',stdio:'inherit'});x('7za a -tzip -mx9 ../android_arm_gkill_server_'+v+'.zip gkill_server',{cwd:'release/android_arm',stdio:'inherit'});x('7za a -tzip -mx9 ../android_arm64_gkill_server_'+v+'.zip gkill_server',{cwd:'release/android_arm64',stdio:'inherit'});fs.copyFileSync('release/android_apk/gkill.apk','release/gkill_'+v+'.apk');fs.copyFileSync('release/wear_os/gkill_wear_companion.apk','release/gkill_wear_companion_'+v+'.apk');fs.copyFileSync('release/wear_os/gkill_wear_watch.apk','release/gkill_wear_watch_'+v+'.apk')" && npm run prepare_gkill_sample_data && npm run clean_release_zip_src
scripts.clean_release_zip_src: cd release && rimraf android_apk && rimraf android_arm && rimraf android_arm64 && rimraf linux_amd64 && rimraf linux_arm && rimraf linux_arm64 && rimraf windows_amd64 && rimraf gkill_sample_data && rimraf wear_os
scripts.install_app: npm run prepare_install && cd src/server/gkill/main/gkill && go install -ldflags "-H windowsgui"
scripts.install_server: npm run prepare_install && npm run go_install
scripts.setup_gkill_develop_env: node -e "var x=require('child_process').execSync;if(require('os').platform()!=='linux'){console.error('This script is for Ubuntu/WSL only');process.exit(1)};console.log('[1/2] Installing apt packages...');x('sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y p7zip-full default-jdk',{stdio:'inherit'});console.log('[2/2] Installing Go tools...');x('go install github.com/akavel/rsrc@latest',{stdio:'inherit'});var ok=true;if(!process.env.ANDROID_HOME&&!process.env.ANDROID_SDK_ROOT){console.warn('WARNING: ANDROID_HOME/ANDROID_SDK_ROOT not set. Install Android SDK for APK builds.');ok=false};console.log(ok?'Setup complete! All dependencies are ready.':'Setup complete! See warnings above for optional dependencies.')"
scripts.test: npm run test_server && npm run test_client && npm run test_mcp && npm run test_android && npm run test_wear_os
scripts.test_client: npm run test_client_unit && npm run test_client_e2e
